name: Brave Origin
description: Unlocks Brave Origin and enables feature toggle controls.

name: Bypass license check
description: Bypasses the Google Play LVL backend license check, allowing full app access without activation.

name: Disable analytics
description: Suppresses Truecaller's CleverTap behavioural event tracking to prevent user-activity telemetry.

name: Enable premium features
description: Unlocks all client-side premium features by bypassing the feature-availability gate.

name: Freedium
description: Adds a profile setting to choose the Freedium Mirror host, and a floating button on articles that opens the current article using the chosen Freedium Mirror in a webview.

name: Hide 'Get Premium' banners
description: Dismisses premium upgrade prompts and paywall screens automatically.

name: Hide ads
description: Removes ads from the after-call screen and caller-ID overlay.

name: Hide premium upgrade prompts
description: Removes 'Get Premium' and 'Switch to Premium' buttons from the nav bar, settings, and profile.

name: Mock premium
description: Always shows the premium/gold badge and unlocks premium UI features.

name: MyGate
description: Unlocks MyGate premium, removes ads, fixes notifications and e-Intercom.

name: Remove Premium UI
description: Removes the Premium tab from the bottom navigation bar and the Premium row in the profile section.

name: Unlock premium
description: Unlocks all AT4K premium features by forcing the premium status to true.

name: Unlock Pro
description: Spoofs Splitwise Pro subscription status everywhere it is checked — bypasses the server-driven feature gate (charts, receipt scanning, currency conversion, default splits, auto-split, transaction import, itemization), forces Person.isPro() to true for receipt quality and UI gating, and suppresses all in-app upsell ad banners (home-screen, recent activity, post-add-expense). Works entirely client-side with no server interaction.
